description: Simulate a robots.txt change to block the 'Travel' category on 'https://books.toscrape.com/' using a custom robots.txt configuration. Disallow the path '/catalogue/category/books/travel_2/' and crawl the website. Verify that Travel category URLs are blocked while other categories, such as Mystery, remain accessible. Export the report of URLs blocked by robots.txt to '~/Documents/SEO/exports/blocked_urls.csv' and the internal HTML report of allowed pages to '~/Documents/SEO/exports/allowed_pages.csv'.
